settings.text: From fluid services to major drivetrain work—scoped, priced, and completed to spec.

settings.title: Core repair categories
settings.description: Tap through for scope; every job starts with inspection and your approval.

settings.title: Brakes & chassis
settings.description: Pads, rotors, calipers, lines, and ABS diagnostics. We measure runout and recommend only what safety demands.

settings.title: Engine & cooling
settings.description: Check engine lights, overheating, water pumps, head gaskets, and performance issues. Scans, leak tests, and compression when needed.

settings.title: Transmission & driveline
settings.description: Fluid exchanges, valve body concerns, CV axles, differentials, and transfer cases—with road tests to verify shifts.

settings.title: Tires & alignment
settings.description: Mounting, balancing, rotation, and four-wheel alignments. We match OEM specs to protect tire life and handling.

settings.title: Electrical & hybrid/EV
settings.description: Charging faults, 12V systems, HV isolation, and battery health checks performed with proper PPE and tooling.

settings.title: A/C & climate
settings.description: Leak detection, compressor replacement, and recharge to manufacturer refrigerant type. Comfort without cutting corners.

settings.title: Popular service packages
settings.description: Bundled pricing for common intervals—final total confirmed after inspection.

settings.title: Daily driver
settings.features:
+ Synthetic oil & filter
+ Multi-point inspection
+ Top-off fluids
+ Tire rotation

settings.title: Brake confidence
settings.features:
+ Front pad & rotor service
+ Hardware & lubrication
+ Brake fluid test
+ Road test

settings.title: Fleet PM slot
settings.features:
+ Scheduled PM windows
+ Digital inspections
+ Batch invoicing
+ Priority bay access

settings.question: Do you offer loaner vehicles or a shuttle?
settings.answer: We partner with a local rental agency for discounted day rates and can provide a shuttle within a 10-mile radius when scheduled in advance.

settings.question: How long does a typical diagnosis take?
settings.answer: Most driveability concerns are diagnosed within 1–2 hours. Complex intermittent issues may require overnight monitoring; we will update you before additional time is billed.

settings.question: What warranties do you provide?
settings.answer: Qualifying repairs include a 36-month / 36,000-mile nationwide parts and labor warranty on most components. Wear items like brakes and tires follow manufacturer prorated coverage.

settings.question: Can I supply my own parts?
settings.answer: For liability and warranty reasons we install OEM-quality or OE parts we source. Exceptions are reviewed case-by-case for fleet accounts with approved vendors.

settings.title: Fleet desk
settings.text: Email fleet@torqueauto.example with VINs and PM intervals. We respond within one business day.
